decisions.title: M3 closeout scope from C6 audit
decisions.description: Audit result accepted: no stop conditions. Remaining mandatory closeout item for M3 is builder observability test coverage gap (#2). Non-blocking items #1/#3/#4/#5 moved to post-M3 backlog with explicit ownership and guards.

decisions.title: M3 closeout slicing
decisions.description: Single atomic closeout commit: test(insights) add builder metric assertions and module tidy update. No runtime behavior changes. Rollback: revert commit b8f18d0.

decisions.title: M3 closeout execution
decisions.description: Implemented commit b8f18d0 (test(insights): add vpvr builder metrics assertions) touching only internal/core/insights/app/build_volume_profile_test.go and internal/core/insights/go.mod (tidy).

decisions.title: M3 closeout validation and backlog handoff
decisions.description: All 9 gates rerun in strict order and passed after b8f18d0. M4 backlog from audit: (1) bounded instrumentation cardinality policy for instrument labels, (2) evaluate amortization for builder gauge sets in high burst, (3) replace vpvr_writer_upsert_latency_ms stub(0) with real DB latency when durable writer is introduced.
